sous_titres.text: Oh, okay. Hold on, hold on man--
Hey, what's going on? Chill man.
I was here 8 months ago. Can you please just check your papers?
Okay, you're gonna do it or?
What do you mean a second, I've been here like 5 minutes.
What the fuck are you talking about?
That's the fucking watch you left here eight months ago.
I know the watch I left, and it wasn't that one.
Now get the fuck out of here before I call someone.
Can you put it in the drawer, please?
You can be all over that, I know you're not.
I thought she was jacking you, to be totally honest.
Hands up! Everybody out! Move! Move!
Get the hell out on the ground!
Move! Get out! Get the fuck down! On the ground!
We moved it all to the headquarters this afternoon.
You don't have to do that.
I'll tell you where it is.
I'll tell you where it is.
It won't be long before the Albanians get here. Let's go!
You guys don't even know who you're stealing from, do you?
-Hey, hey, hey, what are you doing? -No witnesses is necessary.
With this amount of money, you could start a whole bunch of fucking lives.
Smooth as silk, just like you planned.
Lay low. Keep to your routines.
Make sure no one's sniffing our trail.
On the 10th, we get across to Rez.
Mr. Rhodes, just to say thank you very much for
giving me a second chance to be a part of this.
Finn is no longer with us anymore.
Come on, come on, come on, come on, come on.
Honey, 20 years ago, I brought your fever down.
So don't tell me what to do.
Thank you, Carol. You're a lifesaver.
He's family to me. Both of you are.
You know, your grandmother would have been proud.
Fuck no. She would've killed me for putting on this uniform.
Half the Rez still wants to.
You're doing good things, Ani. I know it.
And I just wanted to go at it.
But Jim dives in, chasing after
And uh, get this, she's real Native American.
Hey , well, nice to meet you. We're just headed out.
Right. Come on, cut us some slack here.
And the ice is still blue.
It was clear yesterday. It'll be gray tomorrow.
And who's gonna to stop us?
Oh, no. Ani, Ani, Ani. Hey, Ani.
Hey, you can't treat any tourists this way.
I mean, they bring in good money.
They're good folks, all right? Let's just
be a little bit more accommodating.
You want me to talk to them?
Wait, wait, wait! Ho-hold up. Guys, she's got a job to do, all right?
I'm sure if we play nice, she'll take it off.
He said his truck's stuck out there in the middle of a lake,
-about three miles east of the old mill. -Yeah, I'll head out there now.
Oh, uh, and by the way, a bunch of us are headed
out to Slippery Rock tonight if you want to join.
the Lord, he forgives a sinner.
But if you do sin, then you gotta repent.
Like he said in that story about the son who
took his inheritance and then whored and gambled
and did all the wrong things... He returned home,
But the father, he welcomed the sinner son back
and the kid, well, he repented.
And so they threw a big party for him.
For our Lord has space in his heart for sinners, for sure.
Thank you. Thank you very much.
You have a moment for a sinner, Father?
No sins I can help you with.
Oh, it's something you definitely can.
That plane disappeared almost six months ago.
Never made it to the other side of the Rez.
So, I'm thinking the tracking device leads us to the sunken Cessna.
Go for the suitcases, and that's it.
So we could use you as a guide.
Help us with your people on the ice.
Dax is on the other side of the lake.
Just like the good old days.
Yeah, well, there's a little blood on every dollar bill.
Is that why you changed your name to Milcham?
So you rose from the ashes.
got some projects of my own now.
About ten hours before this starts melting.
The tracker's moving on the ice.
Could be the current shifting it.
Or maybe somebody else is out there.
Who'd you tell about the money, Pen?
I didn't tell anybody about the money.
-I can get you out of there. -Thanks.
But she is married to me, after all.
I passed him a ways back.
I've seen him from time to time.
A couple of walleye, a perch.
-Gonna take a look. -It's just fishing gear, and...
I'm gonna need you to take off your backpack, slowly.
Hands up where I can see them.
Place them on the cab of the truck. No sudden movements.
You have any weapons? Anything sharp?
Hands behind your back. Come on.
-It's no problem, Ani. - A whole suitcase full of cash.
Yeah, a real fucking win on the lottery.
You should turn around for your safety.
I think you've got something of ours.
I don't know what you're talking about.
-Thought you said no violence, man.- There is no violence.
-Let's just get the money-- -Search the fucking truck.
Looks like the tire got hit by a bullet
Tell him to get to them from the north. Yeah?
They said "Where's the rest of the money?".
Where's the rest of the money, and who the fuck are they?
There's more money in the plane?
And you're a part of it?
What are they doing? Drugs? Weapons? What?
I just live on the land.
Yeah, Jed told me some bullshit about your wife.
I saw the plane. That's it.
I was supposed to check fishing licenses,
not shoot and get shot at.
I'm not made for this shit.
From the north? I'm on my way, babe.
We got multiple shooters on the ice.
but they're coming. Send help now.
The poacher, is he anything to do with this?
I- I- I don't know. Maybe.
I-I'm calling for backup. I'm on my way.
No, no, no, no, no, no.
On foot, that's too far. We're not gonna make it. They got wheels.
We gotta split up. They can't follow both of us.
If either of us go under, we'll both drown with these on.
Got a bullet for you if you try anything.
A long time ago, five or six warriors were chased out here by
thirty soldiers from the 1st American Regiment.
Soldiers had guns. The natives knew the lake .
Warriors pushed them right out into the center.
When night came, the ice had melted. The soldiers started to panic.
In the middle of the night,
God brought his wrath down upon them and,
Their charred bodies found days later, half frozen in the ice.
You've become a fucking bedwetter, Pen.
You need to turn that God shit off.
And now that we finally get a hit on the signal, you want to quit?
You want to leave, be my guest.
And we made a deal with the devil.
People have lived on this land for over a thousand years.
Those murderers have no idea what they're walking into.
You know how to walk the gray ice?
Got him. Ellis, start the truck. Let's move!
Ellis, give us some fucking gas, let's go!
No, no, no. The ice will give. Ellis, don't.
Make a line. Hold each other's hands.
Furthest out on the strong ice.
It's going to sink and take us with it.
Just do as he fucking says, okay?
Ellis, now move slowly to the other seat.
I got a bad feeling about this, Pen.
Don't worry, stay calm. We're getting you out.
The Irish say a bullet's made for each of us the day we're born.
I'm tossing you the belt. You hang on.
We're going to get you out, stay calm!
Don't let go. You hear me? Don't you let go.
Grab it, grab it, grab it, grab it!
Where'd you learn to speak Blackfoot?
We're not going to reach help in time.
We're not going to make it to him either. Listen.
Listen, of here. I got some gear.
Ice is melting faster that way.
if we make it there, at least we have a chance.
We're losing a millimeter of ice every 30 minutes.
Yo, Dax, let's get the snowmobile down.
-You can get to them faster. -Put some fucking clothes on.
We'll take the truck around the weak ice and meet you at the shore.
The hide's over there. How many rounds you got left?
Never tell a suspect you're out of bullets.
The cars will pull us under. We're going to have to go around.
I have a son about that age.
He's at home now. He's sick.
I only got that one shitty arrow,
so I got to get him off that snowmobile if I'm going to get a shot.
Now tell me where the fucking plane is!
Okay? Are you okay? Are you okay?
We gotta get you someplace warm.
Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey, hey! Okay, okay.
Yo, I think they went this way. Up here.
There's a hide up here in the forest.
Not the poacher. We need him for coordinates.
Come on, we have to lose them.
There, there. Let's go, come on.
So what you're saying is we shouldn't be here.
Hey, I don't give a fuck about your woo-woo shit.
I'm gonna get them and I'm--
-Fuck! Goddamn it. -Get me the fuck out!
-Here, get behind me. -Fucking help me, guys!
All right, give me your hand.
-Give me your hand! -I need fucking help or something.
You have to pull your foot out.
-You're gonna have to pull your foot out. -Fuck you, Pen!
-Hey! Hey! Hey! I'll pull you out -Fuck, ah, ah! Oh my God.
I got it. I got it. Ah!
Get your clothes off. All of them.
We're too deep in the caves.
I got it. I got it.
And we're stronger as a team.
to keep everyone together as a team, I mean...
Me and Dax, We were gonna...
I don't see you wiping no babies' asses.
It's not like she's a junkie, you know. She--
She got some kind of infection.
It was like Mia was already gone.
She wouldn't let me touch her.
She stopped talking till the house was just
I mean I-I don't know what the fuck to do with the pain.
So i-it's like I blow my brains out or I
You know, I just stayed drunk.
I don't know how long she's been dead when I found her.
It's the only place where I feel close to her.
But for almost fucking drowning in that car today, I deserve this.
You think there's a chance at a second life?
You gotta grab what you can in your first one.
Chances are too high he doesn't exist.
I know how this looks, but
It's just a game warden and a poacher.
This was not meant to happen.
She wanted me to wear it if I went on a mission.
it would bring me home safe.
Do you know what hers was?
And you've never felt her spirit?
I-I think about her all the time.
My people, we have a cleansing ritual.
Helps us mourn our loved ones.
But you can let go of the guilt.
She wants you to live, Harlan.
You know what I've discovered over the years of working together?
Is that home isn't a place.
It's what we have right here.
You can handle just about anything.
I found you on the streets.
you're still a little young and wild.
But hey, that's the privilege of youth.
But then again, loyalty is expected even from the cutest puppy.
You can imagine my surprise when I met that fag friend of yours
in that shithole village by the lake.
he admitted that he was here to steal the money.
he told me that it was you.
This isn't what it looks like. I'm sorry--
Should one be allowed to fail, to be weak?
Shh, shh, shh, shh, shh, shh.
And you're a piece of shit, Ellis.
You don't deserve to be part
of this group of wonderful people.
You really know your way around here.
As a little girl, the elders would teach us how to hunt out in the woods.
And we'd go back to the caves and eat and sleep.
I can't believe I never heard about this place.
Him. He tried to kill her.
And then you take him here to this secret spot?
-I didn't mean to-- -It's on me to just--
You dragged his niece out of the community.
-Took her to the city. -That's not what happened.
She was like family. She was happy.
But you, you took her away.
I didn't take her. We loved each other.
If it wasn't for you, she'd still be alive.
We do not have time for this.
They're trying to kill us. They shot Jed.
You're kin. You have a duty.
He's my prisoner. He's with me.
You and I share the blood of our people.
that spirits are in the sky and in the wind.
Those are the ones we fear the most.
Hidden in the dark, away from the sun,
there's a dead forest under this lake.
Ten thousands years ago before the Napikwan came.
It's methane. Explosive gas in those bubbles.
They call it the Empty Quarter.
I know you have licenses for all this.
my grandparents asked me one time,
does it take to lose your connection with the land?
Who are you to say anything about my connection?
-I'm protecting what belongs to all of us. -Well you lost all of us.
Why don't you help yourself to some food back there?
Take all you want. We have lots.
We could hide out here. It's way off track.
You know what they call us.
Listen, this crew that's chasing us,
they're after me because I know where that plane is.
There's no reason for you to put yourself at risk.
made a promise to protect them.
Sheriff Raleigh's on his way. He's 15 minutes out.
We got some unfinished business, aye, Chief.
bring your fucking poison back here to my land?
I want you to know that the crew that's chasing us,
they-they're looking for this plane that's at the bottom of the lake.
Millions, probably. And they're chasing us because I know where it is but,
You know, maybe you, your people, Mia's tribe...
you think you can buy us off and change your luck, hm?
I'm not trying to pay you off.
life isn't like a choo-choo train...
where you can get off at any station and then move on to your own liking.
My God wants us to repent and be reborn.
I had an interesting conversation with Ellis about that yesterday.
I'd like to forego my share of the money, Mr. Rhodes.
Only God can forgive me or give me the punishment I deserve.
What happened here? I've been looking all over for you.
He play any role in this?
Look, I called it in. Backup's on the way. But we gotta go.
Enough. So, where did it happen?
-They attacked out on the middle-- -No, no, no. I mean where is it?
Headquarters wants to know where that plane is.
How'd you know there was a plane?
This is a very important moment.
One that you're gonna look back on years from now and realize
how wise you are in telling me exactly what I need to know.
Come on, we can make out real good here, Ani.
This isn't like you. Why are you doing this?
Come on. It's their money, Ani, just--
We're giving it back, for Crissakes.
How much are they giving you?
Five percent of whatever's on that plane.
Five percent. I'd gladly split it with you.
Yeah, if we give them Harlan, right?
Get in the goddamn car, let's go!
There's nothing to worry about here, all right?
It's methane, you idiot. You're gonna blow the whole lake.
You got him to bring them here?
You realize handing me over to them,
you're giving up millions of dollars.
Why would you do that? I can just take you to the plane.
I'm gonna need your word that you're gonna let us go.
I got a GPS tracker in the backpack.
It's got the coordinates in it.
-This can't be serious. -Don't do anything stupid.
Fuck! Fuck, come on. Come on.
What do you want me to do?
You've killed over a hundred people, and now your God won't allow this one?
Get on the ground, Rhodes! Get on the ground!
was tell us where that plane was.
Remember, he's the one killing you.
He's been out there on his own for four days.
I heard the Staties found the plane.
Did Harlan give it to you?
You know there's an old saying that uh,
Where'd the money come from for the new community hospital, Oz?
-And this? -You gotta put this in here.
This. And then it's gonna be in the water.
And the other fish is gonna get it, on this reel. Okay?
Look at all the different baits he gave me!
-Let's see what you got. -So this red one is for the big fish.
Oh boy! And this is for the little fish? That's great!
-The blue is for the small ones. -Oh, yeah.
Can I go fishing with Harlan sometimes?
Is Harlan teaching you the right way to do it?
